_compliance_flags: FHA: 3.5% down, 580+ credit score claim — needs LMP IT firm verification
VA: Zero down, no PMI claim — standard but verify language for VA advertising rules
Jumbo: Up to $3M, 10% down minimum, 680+ credit score — verify with current wholesale investor sheets
USDA: Zero down claim — verify USDA program language
Interest-Only: 5 to 10 year interest-only period claim — verify with current portfolio investors
Reverse: 62+ age requirement — federal HECM standard, OK to state
ARM: 3/1, 5/1, 7/1, 10/1 structures — verify currently available with wholesale bench

indexPage.metaDescription: 9 mortgage programs, shopped across 30+ wholesale lenders. FHA, VA, Jumbo, USDA, First-Time Buyer, Reverse, Interest-Only, ARM, Fixed-Rate. Available in MA, NH, ME, RI, CT, FL, CO, VT, TX.
indexPage.headline: Nine programs. 9 ways home.
indexPage.subheadline: Every borrower is different. Every loan should be too. We shop 30+ wholesale lenders to fit your situation, not theirs.

ctaSection.headline: Not sure which program fits?
ctaSection.body: Take the 5-question quiz. We'll match you to the right program and the right LO.

detailPage.documentsNote: [DEMO COPY — pending client review. Document checklist may vary by program.]
documentChecklist: Two years of W-2s or tax returns
detailPage.faqNote: [COMPLIANCE-REVIEW-PENDING — all program-specific copy needs LMP IT firm signoff before publish.]

timeline.q: What's the typical timeline for a {programName}?
timeline.a: From application to closing, most files clear in 14 to 30 days. We anchor specific timelines once we shop your file across our wholesale lender bench.

creditScore.q: What credit score do I need?
creditScore.a: {eligibility}. We can talk through alternatives if your file sits below those thresholds.

rateLock.a: Yes. Rate locks are part of the loan estimate process. We walk through the lock window and any associated cost before you commit.

giftDownPayment.q: Can I use a gift for my down payment?
giftDownPayment.a: Yes for most programs. We'll walk through the documentation needed (gift letter, sourced bank deposits) when we sit down.

fixed-rate.name: Fixed-Rate Mortgage
fixed-rate.blurb: Lock your rate for 15 or 30 years. The payment you sign at closing is the payment you make every month, no matter what the market does next.
fixed-rate.eligibility: 30-year and 15-year terms. Conventional credit and income guidelines apply.

fha.name: FHA Loan
fha.blurb: Government-backed and built for first-time and lower-down-payment buyers. Smaller down payment, friendlier credit thresholds, primary residence only.
fha.eligibility: 3.5% down, 580+ credit score, primary residence only.

va.name: VA Loan
va.blurb: A benefit you earned. Zero down, no private mortgage insurance, competitive rates for veterans, active duty service members, and qualifying spouses.
va.eligibility: Zero down, no PMI. Eligible veterans, active duty service members, and qualifying spouses.

jumbo.name: Jumbo Mortgage
jumbo.blurb: Financing above conforming loan limits. We shop wholesale jumbo investors so high-balance loans price competitively, not punitively.
jumbo.eligibility: Up to $3M, 10% down minimum, 680+ credit score.

arm.name: Adjustable-Rate Mortgage
arm.blurb: Lower starting rate for a fixed intro period, then it adjusts. Smart play if you plan to move, refinance, or upgrade before the reset.
arm.eligibility: 3/1, 5/1, 7/1, and 10/1 ARM structures. Standard income and credit qualifying.

usda.name: USDA Mortgage
usda.blurb: Zero-down financing for eligible rural and suburban homes. Quietly powerful for the right address, especially across northern New England and rural CT.
usda.eligibility: Zero down. Property must fall inside USDA-eligible geography. Income limits apply by county.

first-time-buyer.name: First-Time Home Buyer
first-time-buyer.blurb: Programs and grants built for the first home, including state down-payment assistance: MassHousing, NHHFA, MaineHousing, RIHousing, CHFA, VHFA, FL Hometown Heroes, TSAHC, CHFA-CO.
first-time-buyer.eligibility: Eligibility varies by state and program. We walk you through every option you qualify for.

reverse.name: Reverse Mortgage
reverse.blurb: Convert home equity into income or a line of credit while staying in the home you love. Built for retirement-stage homeowners 62 and older.
reverse.eligibility: Primary borrower must be 62 or older. Owner-occupied primary residence required.

interest-only.name: Interest-Only Mortgage
interest-only.blurb: Pay interest only for the first 5 to 10 years, freeing cash flow for investment, business, or a renovation. Specialized program, specific use cases, and we will tell you when it does not fit.
interest-only.eligibility: 5 to 10 year interest-only period. Stronger credit and reserve requirements typical.
